title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Kofi discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite her with her family through kindness and courage.

pages.text: Kofi loved exploring the golden savanna near his village. The tall grass swayed in the warm breeze, and colorful birds sang happy songs.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden savanna grass painted with thick gouache brushstrokes, warm orange sunset colors, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through golden savanna grassland

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a sad crying sound. "Waaaah! Waaaah!" It came from behind a big baobab tree. What could it be?

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes standing next to a massive baobab tree painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors and textured painterly style, listening carefully
illustration.alt: Kofi listening to crying sounds near a baobab tree

pages.text: Kofi walked closer and peeked around the tree. There sat a tiny baby elephant, all alone! Tears rolled down her wrinkled gray cheeks.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes discovering a small baby elephant crying, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, golden grass, expressive animals, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Kofi finding a crying baby elephant behind the tree

pages.text: "Don't cry, little elephant," Kofi said softly. "I'm Kofi. What's your name?" The baby elephant sniffled. "I'm Kesi. I lost my mama!"

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling beside baby elephant Kesi, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors and textured painterly style, both characters looking sad but hopeful
illustration.alt: Kofi comforting the baby elephant named Kesi

pages.text: Kofi sat down next to Kesi. "We'll find your mama together," he promised. "But first, you must be thirsty. Let's find some water."

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes sitting next to baby elephant Kesi under orange sunset, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, warm savanna colors, golden grass, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Kofi sitting with baby elephant making a promise

pages.text: They walked to the watering hole. Kesi drank with her tiny trunk while Kofi splashed cool water on her dusty skin. She felt much better!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes helping baby elephant Kesi drink at a watering hole, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style with golden grass
illustration.alt: Kofi helping Kesi drink water at the watering hole

pages.text: "Listen!" said Kofi. In the distance, they heard loud trumpeting sounds. "PFFFRRRR! PFFFRRRR!" Kesi's ears perked up. "That's my family!"

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and baby elephant Kesi listening to distant trumpeting sounds, painted in gouache with thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, orange sunset, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Kofi and Kesi listening to elephant trumpeting sounds

pages.text: They hurried toward the sound. Soon they saw a big elephant family searching everywhere. "MAMA!" trumpeted Kesi. "KESI!" trumpeted her mama back.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching baby elephant Kesi running toward a herd of elephants painted with thick gouache brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly style with golden grass
illustration.alt: Kesi running toward her elephant family with Kofi watching

pages.text: Kesi's mama hugged her tight with her trunk. "Thank you, Kofi," she said. "You're very kind." Kofi smiled big. He had made wonderful new friends!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes smiling as mama elephant hugs baby Kesi with her trunk, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes, warm savanna colors, orange sunset, textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Happy reunion as mama elephant hugs Kesi while Kofi smiles

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound did Kofi hear behind the baobab tree?
questions.explanation: Kofi heard a sad crying sound that led him to discover the lost baby elephant.

questions.question: What is the baby elephant's name?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant tells Kofi her name is Kesi when they first meet.

questions.question: Where did Kofi take Kesi to drink water?
questions.explanation: Kofi took Kesi to the watering hole so she could drink and cool down.

questions.question: How did they find Kesi's family?
questions.explanation: They heard the loud trumpeting sounds of Kesi's family searching for her.
